caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap is seated behind a table, appearing in a small picture-in-picture window on the right side of the screen. The table is covered with a black mat featuring a large orange and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS". Several boxes of trading cards are scattered across the surface, including a prominent box in the foreground that says "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and "2020". To the left, a stack of similar boxes is piled up, with "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" visible on the sides. In the background, white containers and other card-related equipment are visible. The scene remains static across the frames, with the person in the inset window maintaining a similar posture while observing the items on the table. The overall environment is set up for a card-breaking session, with various Topps branded materials present.
